Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const sql = fs.readFileSync\('supabase/migrations/20260506000001_admin_foundation.sql', 'utf8'\); const checks = ['CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.platform_staff', 'role TEXT NOT NULL CHECK \(role IN \(\\\\'super_admin\\\\', \\\\'operator\\\\'\)\)', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_platform_staff', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_super_admin', 'SECURITY DEFINER', 'pdmckinster@gmail.com', 'ON CONFLICT \(user_id\) DO NOTHING']; const missing = checks.filter\(c => !sql.includes\(c\)\); if \(missing.length\) { console.error\('MISSING:', missing\); process.exit\(1\); } console.log\('OK section 1+2+3'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const sql = fs.readFileSync\('supabase/migrations/20260506000001_admin_foundation.sql', 'utf8'\); const mutable = ['organizations','profiles','organization_members','automation_templates','automations','automation_requests','subscriptions','notifications','invitations']; const immutable = ['automation_executions','chat_messages']; const errors = []; for \(const t of mutable\) { for \(const verb of ['select','insert','update','delete']\) { const policy = t+'_admin_'+verb; if \(!sql.includes\(policy\)\) errors.push\('missing '+policy\); } } for \(const t of immutable\) { if \(!sql.includes\(t+'_admin_select'\)\) errors.push\('missing '+t+'_admin_select'\); if \(sql.includes\(t+'_admin_insert'\) || sql.includes\(t+'_admin_update'\) || sql.includes\(t+'_admin_delete'\)\) errors.push\('unexpected mutation policy on immutable '+t\); } if \(errors.length\) { console.error\(errors.join\('\\n'\)\); process.exit\(1\); } console.log\('OK 9 mutable x4 verbs + 2 immutable select'\);")

Bash(node -e "const en = require\('./web/messages/en.json'\); const es = require\('./web/messages/es.json'\); function flatten\(obj, prefix=''\) { const out = []; for \(const k of Object.keys\(obj\)\) { const v = obj[k]; const key = prefix ? prefix+'.'+k : k; if \(v && typeof v === 'object' && !Array.isArray\(v\)\) out.push\(...flatten\(v, key\)\); else out.push\(key\); } return out; } const enKeys = flatten\(en.admin || {}, 'admin'\).sort\(\); const esKeys = flatten\(es.admin || {}, 'admin'\).sort\(\); const missingInEs = enKeys.filter\(k => !esKeys.includes\(k\)\); const missingInEn = esKeys.filter\(k => !enKeys.includes\(k\)\); if \(missingInEs.length || missingInEn.length\) { console.error\('PARITY MISMATCH'\); console.error\('In en, missing in es:', missingInEs\); console.error\('In es, missing in en:', missingInEn\); process.exit\(1\); } if \(enKeys.length < 18\) { console.error\('Expected at least 18 admin keys, got', enKeys.length\); process.exit\(1\); } console.log\('OK', enKeys.length, 'admin keys with EN/ES parity'\);")
